subcodes.first_line: The divine Fire hath been manifested from the blessed Lote-Tree, and the light of Oneness doth shine resplendent from the horizon of His Countenance. This is the Day of remembrance and praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نار الهی از سدره مبارکه ظاهر و نور احدیه از افق وجه ساطع امروز روز ذکر و ثناست
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
